name: UBA : Browsed to Government Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
   http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%goverment%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%military%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%politic%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%society%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%social science' OR "Web Category" ilike '%non-profit%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%charitable organization%' OR "Web Category" in (4, 11, 72, 73, 122, 123, 124, 125, 208) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Browsed to Government Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

AND when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%goverment%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%military%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%politic%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%society%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%social science' OR "Web Category" ilike '%non-profit%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%charitable organization%' OR "Web Category" in (4, 11, 72, 73, 122, 123, 124, 125, 208) AQL filter query
